title: Resolution Approving the Supplemental Investment Program (SIP) for Supplemental Budget of Various Offices for the Year 2022 Amounting to Ten Million Eight Hundred Fifty Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (P 10,850,000.00) Chargeable Against the Beginning Balance for Cy 2022. ( AUTHOR: COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 06/13/22)
